text:
Created attachment 172487
Patch to update borgbackup from 1.0.5 to 1.0.6

+++ This bug was initially created as a clone of Bug #210902 +++

Patch to update py-borgbackup from 1.0.5 to 1.0.6. Please note the USES+=ssl clause, instead of USE_OPENSSL=yes.




Changelog:


https://github.com/borgbackup/borg/blob/1.0.6/docs/changes.rst
